title: Trapped Ion Gates: From Single-Qubit to Entanglement
description: Learn how quantum gates are implemented on trapped ions using laser pulses, from single-qubit rotations to the Molmer-Sorensen and geometric phase gates.
learningObjectives: Understand single-qubit gates using stimulated Raman transitions
Describe the Molmer-Sorensen gate and its advantages
Calculate gate fidelities and error sources
